functional.notes: make test passed; auth route guard scenario passed; live auth-wall curl scenario passed for /dashboard redirect, login error UX, /api/auth/current-user malformed credentials, and anonymous /api/repos. make test-e2e and focused Playwright auth runs were attempted but timed out before emitting browser test progress in this session; Ever CLI sessions expired immediately, so manual browser verification used direct HTTP responses and rendered HTML inspection.

api_contract.notes: Protected API endpoints tested through direct Rust handlers and live curl probes. Missing or malformed credentials returned application/json 401 envelopes with error.code not_authenticated; valid-cookie no-DB path returns database_unavailable only after cookie verification per existing tests.

security.notes: Unauthenticated and malformed Authorization/Cookie probes did not bypass auth, did not reflect injected token/script values, and did not leak cookie values or stack traces. OPTIONS returned 405 without Access-Control-Allow-Origin for https://evil.com.

accessibility.notes: not applicable for this feature category; QA_MODULES included base, api, security, footer only
